metadata.description: Persistent memory for coding agents — install the Cookbook Memory plugin (recall skill + MCP tool + lifecycle hooks) into Claude Code straight from this repo, no clone required.

plugins.name: cookbook-memory
plugins.description: Persistent memory for Claude Code (recall skill + MCP tool + fail-open lifecycle hooks), routed through the memory engine. Requires the cookbook-memory Python package on the host (pip install --user from this repo) so the bundle's `python3 -m cookbook_memory` entry points resolve.
